title: The Software Engineering Lifecycle: A Practitioner's Approach
description: A high-level flowchart depicting the core phases of the software engineering lifecycle as outlined in Pressman's 'A Practitioner's Approach', showing the iterative flow from planning to deployment and maintenance.
relationships: The process flows sequentially from Communication to Deployment but is iterative, allowing feedback loops from any phase back to previous ones (e.g., issues in Construction lead back to Modeling). Maintenance cycles back to Communication for new requirements.
